content.full_text:
April 28, 2008

Nick Aguilar
Patricia Aguilar for City Council
1048 Surrey Drive
Bonita, CA 91902

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-061

Dear Mr. Aguilar:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on April 16, 2008.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Trish Mayer
Political Reform Consultant
